title: Capturing a Global State in a Distributed System
description: A timeline diagram showing the process of recording a consistent global state across three processes (P1, P2, P3) by taking a snapshot of their local states and the state of the communication channels at a specific logical time.
relationships: P1 records S1 and sends a marker to P2 and P3
P2 receives marker, records S2 and in-transit messages for C12
P3 receives marker, records S3 and in-transit messages for C23 and C31
The collected local states and channel states form a consistent global state snapshot
